name: duckdb_list_files
description: List all queryable data files (CSV, Parquet, JSON, TSV) across worker data layers (my_data, domain_data, common). Each file has a view_name — use it in duckdb_query SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM <view_name>. Do NOT use read_csv_auto() with file paths.

include_metadata.description: Include file size and modification date

_worker_context.description: Injected by agent — worker scope dict
